title: Update SCHC compression rules and buffer sizing in gateway to account for added SRH (Routing Header) overhead in local_mesh path
description: Ensure post-SRH IPv6 packet size is handled correctly by SCHC rules before L2 framing. Reference SCHC profile in spec and lichen-schc crate. Fix any buffer overflows or rule mismatches flagged in codereview.
close_reason: Updated SCHC buffer sizing and fixed local_mesh SRH allocation/lifetime in gateway; increased SCHC_MAX_DECOMPRESSED; addressed codereview buffer and rule issues per spec profile. Tests blocked by Cargo parse errors in unrelated modules.
